title: Error Object
description: Single design rule check (DRC) or electrical rule check (ERC) error.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

properties.name: code
properties.description: Numeric identifier for the rule or check that was violated (ERC/DRC error code).

properties.name: errorType
properties.description: Severity or category of this error (warning, failure, consistency, or airwire).

properties.name: id
properties.description: Zero-based index of this error within the errors collection.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: layer
properties.description: Layer number (1-based) where the error occurs; 0 for ERC errors.

properties.name: moduleName
properties.description: Name of the schematic module (sheet or symbol) where the error occurs; empty for DRC.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: s1
properties.description: First string parameter substituted into the error message template (e.g., part name, net name); empty for DRC.

properties.name: s2
properties.description: Second string parameter substituted into the error message template; empty for DRC.

properties.name: s3
properties.description: Third string parameter substituted into the error message template; empty for DRC.

properties.name: s4
properties.description: Fourth string parameter substituted into the error message template; empty for DRC.

properties.name: s5
properties.description: Fifth string parameter substituted into the error message template; empty for DRC.

properties.name: s6
properties.description: Sixth string parameter substituted into the error message template; empty for DRC.

properties.name: sheet
properties.description: Sheet number where the error occurs; 0 for DRC.

properties.name: signature
properties.description: Unique signature string for this error (used for matching, e.g., when approving).

properties.name: state
properties.description: Approval status of this error (active, processed, or approved).

properties.name: x
properties.description: X coordinate of the error location, in internal units.

properties.name: y
properties.description: Y coordinate of the error location, in internal units.
